name: Starship Propellant Tank
description: Main LOX/LCH4 propellant tank for the Starship upper stage. Feeds 3 Raptor Vac + 3 Raptor SL engines. Capacity: 264 t LCH4 + 936 t LOX = 1200 t total (O/F 3.55). The windward side is covered by the same hexagonal heat-shield tiles as the nosecone, so it survives reentry belly-first.
